root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

data_date.text: หนี้ ณ วันที่

book_date.text: ให้ไว้ ณ วันที่

root.sql:
select trim(sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name)||' '||'ขอรับรองว่า'||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as paragraph_1 , ' เป็นสมาชิก'||trim(sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name)||' เลขทะเบียนสมาชิก '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)|| ' สังกัด' ||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as paragraph_2 , ' ณ วันที่ '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','SD MONTH YYYY'))||' มีหนี้สินผูกพันกับสหกรณ์' as paragraph_3 , ' จำนวน '||(to_snumber(((select coalesce(sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ))::bigint))|| ' บาท ('||pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(((select sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ))::double precision)||')' as paragraph_4 , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!'as data_date , '!book_no!'as book_no , '!book_date!'as book_date , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cnt_m_coop where 1=1 and ((select coalesce(sum(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atdate ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!data_date!' )),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) > 0) --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '049898' /*WHERE*/
